untranslatable_reason: Signal requires dealer inventory position data (55th percentile threshold), bid-ask spread baseline tracking (110% expansion), and uninformed trader pressure detection — none of which are available in the allowed indicator set. These are microstructure variables not present in standard OHLCV/technical indicator data.
translation_notes: Attempted proxy mapping: (1) 'Price discount to fundamental value >= 0.75%' mapped to returns < -0.75% as a price weakness indicator; (2) 'Dealer long inventory' and 'spread widened' mapped to volume > sma_20 and atr_14 > 1.1 as rough proxies for dealer activity and market friction; (3) Exit at 3 trading days honored; (4) Cannot accurately represent dealer inventory percentiles or bid-ask spread mechanics with available indicators. Direction set to CONTEXT_DEPENDENT per signal specification.
